channel.title: House of Blues Houston
channel.description: Upcoming events for House of Blues Houston

item.title: Stokley
item.description:
Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

This is an all ages seated floor event. Doors open at 7PM. VIP Tables seat 4 humans and are first come first serve if you purchase in that section. Please arrive early so that our hosts may seat your party together. Box office opens at 6PM. This is an all ages seated floor event. Doors open at 7PM. VIP Tables seat 4 humans and are first come first serve if you purchase in that section. Please arrive early so that our hosts may seat your party together. Box office opens at 6PM.

Event details

item.title: JINJER Duel North America 2026
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

BOX OFFICE: 5:00 DOORS: 6:00 All Ages Welcome We're cashless! All points of sale will only accept credit, debit or mobile pay (such as Apple Pay or Google Pay). Will call tickets can be picked up on day of show at the Box Office. Box Office opens 1 hour prior to door times. You will need a valid photo ID and the credit card used for purchase. ADA tickets can be purchased online - you do not need to call the box office to place an order. Look for the logo on the Find Tickets page to view all available accessible seats. We do have accessible seating in every price range but be advised it may sell out. We have very limited seating available for guests on the day of the event so please make sure you purchase accessible seating when you order tickets. Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. For more FAQs please visit www.houston.houseofblues.com/faq BOX OFFICE: 5:00 DOORS: 6:00 All Ages Welcome We're cashless! All points of sale will only accept credit, debit or mobile pay (such as Apple Pay or Google Pay). Will call tickets can be picked up on day of show at the Box Office. Box Office opens 1 hour prior to door times. You will need a valid photo ID and the credit card used for purchase. ADA tickets can be purchased online - you do not need to call the box office to place an order. Look for the logo on the Find Tickets page to view all available accessible seats. We do have accessible seating in every price range but be advised it may sell out. We have very limited seating available for guests on the day of the event so please make sure you purchase accessible seating when you order tickets. Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. For more FAQs please visit www.houston.houseofblues.com/faq

Event details

item.title: idobi Radio Summer School w/ Honey Revenge & more

item.title: You Should Know Podcast Presents: The YSK HOUSE Tour
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

BOX OFFICE: 6:00 PM DOORS: 7:00 PM SHOW: 8:00 PM All Ages Welcome We're cashless! All points of sale will only accept credit, debit or mobile pay (such as Apple Pay or Google Pay). Will call tickets can be picked up on day of show at the Box Office. Box Office opens 1 hour prior to door times. You will need a valid photo ID and the credit card used for purchase. Event details

item.title: Noise Complaints Presents The Late Night R&b Experience Tour - 21+
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Noise Complaints Presents: The Late Night R&B Experience Tour What started as a YouTube series has now become a nationwide movement. Now we're bringing it live to a city near you. An evening of classic and modern R&B, in a room full of people with your same taste in music. We can't wait to see you all on tour. Box Opens: 7:00 Doors: 8:00 This is a 21+ event. Must have valid ID for entry. Noise Complaints Presents: The Late Night R&B Experience Tour What started as a YouTube series has now become a nationwide movement. Now we're bringing it live to a city near you. An evening of classic and modern R&B, in a room full of people with your same taste in music. We can't wait to see you all on tour. Box Opens: 7:00 Doors: 8:00 This is a 21+ event. Must have valid ID for entry.

Event details

item.title: The Marvelous Miss Gender starring BOSCO - Ages 18+ w/ Valid ID
item.description:
Wednesday, July 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Murray & Peter Present: "The Marvelous Miss Gender" starring BOSCO. From RuPaul's Drag Race Season 14, 2022 and most recently All Stars 10 from 2025, BOSCO is now headlining her first ever solo tour. Meet & Greet add-on tickets are sold separately. To attend the M&G, fans must also purchase a ticket to the event. Show starts at 8pm. There will be a 20-minute intermission. Ages 18+ welcome w/ Valid ID for entry. Check DragFans.com and HereIsBosco.com for tour info VIP Tables seat 4 humans and are first come first serve if you purchase in that section. Please arrive early so that our hosts may seat your party together. Murray & Peter Present: "The Marvelous Miss Gender" starring BOSCO. From RuPaul's Drag Race Season 14, 2022 and most recently All Stars 10 from 2025, BOSCO is now headlining her first ever solo tour. Meet & Greet add-on tickets are sold separately. To attend the M&G, fans must also purchase a ticket to the event. Show starts at 8pm. There will be a 20-minute intermission. Ages 18+ welcome w/ Valid ID for entry. Check DragFans.com and HereIsBosco.com for tour info VIP Tables seat 4 humans and are first come first serve if you purchase in that section. Please arrive early so that our hosts may seat your party together.

Event details

item.title: Punchis Punchis: Banda Rave Experience - Ages 18+ Event
item.description:
Friday, July 24, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

BOX OFFICE: 8:00 PM DOORS: 9:00 PM Ages 18+ w/ Valid ID We're cashless! All points of sale will only accept credit, debit or mobile pay (such as Apple Pay or Google Pay). Will call tickets can be picked up on day of show at the Box Office. Box Office opens 1 hour prior to door times. You will need a valid photo ID and the credit card used for purchase. ADA tickets can be purchased online - you do not need to call the box office to place an order. Look for the logo on the Find Tickets page to view all available accessible seats. We do have accessible seating in every price range but be advised it may sell out. We have very limited seating available for guests on the day of the event so please make sure you purchase accessible seating when you order tickets. Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

BOX OFFICE: 6:00 PM DOORS: 7:00 PM All Ages Welcome We're cashless! All points of sale will only accept credit, debit or mobile pay (such as Apple Pay or Google Pay). Will call tickets can be picked up on day of show at the Box Office. Box Office opens 1 hour prior to door times. You will need a valid photo ID and the credit card used for purchase. ADA tickets can be purchased online - you do not need to call the box office to place an order. Look for the logo on the Find Tickets page to view all available accessible seats. We do have accessible seating in every price range but be advised it may sell out. We have very limited seating available for guests on the day of the event so please make sure you purchase accessible seating when you order tickets. Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. For more FAQs please visit www.houston.houseofblues.com/faq BOX OFFICE: 6:00 PM DOORS: 7:00 PM All Ages Welcome We're cashless! item.title: Mario Aguilar - "Diezmadre"
item.description:
Saturday, August 22, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: House of Blues Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

This is an all ages seated floor event. Doors open at 8PM. VIP Tables seat 4 humans and are first come first serve if you purchase in that section. Please arrive early so our hosts may seat your party together. This is an all ages seated floor event. Doors open at 8PM. VIP Tables seat 4 humans and are first come first serve if you purchase in that section. Please arrive early so our hosts may seat your party together.

All points of sale will only accept credit, debit or mobile pay (such as Apple Pay or Google Pay). Will call tickets can be picked up on day of show at the Box Office. Box Office opens 1 hour prior to door times. You will need a valid photo ID and the credit card used for purchase. ADA tickets can be purchased online - you do not need to call the box office to place an order. Look for the logo on the Find Tickets page to view all available accessible seats. We do have accessible seating in every price range but be advised it may sell out. We have very limited seating available for guests on the day of the event so please make sure you purchase accessible seating when you order tickets. Bags up to 12" x 6" x 12" are allowed in the venue. All bags will be searched prior to entry. For more FAQs please visit www.houston.houseofblues.com/faq

Event details
